title: B.Sc (Hons.) Computer Science (Cloud Computing) College
content: In this specialization course, students will learn essential facts, concepts, theories and principles of emerging technologies in cloud and distributed computing. They will reason critically in the assimilation and production of cloud computing artefacts and gain subject-based practical skills. Bachelor of Science in Cloud Computing is one of the best in-demand courses nowadays. Cloud Computing is the practice of using a network of remote servers hosted on the internet rather than a local server or a personal computer to store, manage and process data. XII with Science with minimum 50% marks. (Maths or Computer Application as a subject in XII) Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list For Migration from Other Universities: 1) B.Sc (Hons/Hons with Research) Computer Science (Cloud Computing)Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or 5.0 CGPA on a 10 point scale 2) XII with Science with minimum 50% marks. (Maths or Computer Application as a subject in XII) 01 02 Analyze and synthesis computing systems through quantitative and qualitative techniques. 03 04 05 06 To Develop practical skills to provide solutions to industry, society and business. 07 Understand environmental issues and lead a life with concerns for environment. 08 09 10 Communicate effectively in both verbal and written form. 11 To apply standard software engineering practices and strategies in software project development using opensource programming environment to deliver a quality of product for business success 12 01 02 03 Undertake higher education at institutions of transnational reputation. 01 02 XII with Science with minimum 50% marks.
